message:
feat(core): add model checker bridge methods and convenience API (ft-2p9cb.5.2.2)

Scenario runners (run_scheduler_scenario, run_budget_scenario,
run_recovery_scenario), query API (counterexamples_by_domain,
shortest_counterexample, violated_predicates, inner_checker,
current_trace_len, strategy). 10 unit tests (657 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
